title: POS Cart, Settings Sync, and Stripe Integration Update
summary: This update resolves POS cart layout overlaps, fixes country selector dropdown clipping, syncs settings changes instantly, adds Stripe auto-swap for international payments, and allows flexible item card sizing.
highlights: POS Cart Overlap Fix: Corrected unclosed HTML tags to prevent overlapping of search inputs and cart elements.
Country Selector & Code Picker: Fixed dropdown clipping issues by seting combo container overflow to visible.
Dynamic UPI/Stripe Auto-Swap: Automatically switches payment option to Stripe and logs credit card tenders for non-INR currencies.
Flexible Card Sizing: Adjusted item cards aspect ratio and title wrapping so text is never clipped or hidden.
Instant Settings Sync: Ensured store setting changes in currency or language immediately update the active POS elements.
